title: Men's Bracketology: Miami (Ohio) or Auburn? Sorry, Bruce Pearl -- it's the RedHawks
author: Joe Lunardi
fullText:

summary: The RedHawks are two wins away from an undefeated regular season while the Tigers are barely above .500.
